name: registers lazyToJSON builtin
expr: if builtins ? lazyToJSON then "true" else "false"

name: serializes scalar values
expr: let x = [ "text" 42 true false null ]; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: escapes JSON string bytes
expr: let x = "line\n" + "quote\"" + "slash\\"; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: covers JSON string escaping and UTF-8
expr: let s = builtins.fromJSON "\"plain\\\"\\\\\\b\\f\\n\\r\\t\\u0001\\u00a2\\u20ac\\ud83d\\ude00\""; in builtins.seq s (builtins.lazyToJSON s [])

name: serializes UTF-8 boundary sequences
expr: let s = builtins.readFile @TEST_DIR@/utf8_boundaries.bin; in builtins.seq s (builtins.lazyToJSON s [])

name: leaves root attrset expression lazy
expr: builtins.lazyToJSON { a = 1; } []

name: serializes forced attrsets in lexicographic order
expr: let x = { z = 2; a = "x"; }; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: serializes forced lists
expr: let x = [ 1 true null "x" ]; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: serializes paths
expr: let p = @TEST_DIR@/invalid_utf8.bin; in builtins.seq p (builtins.lazyToJSON p [])

name: skips matching attr paths
expr: let x = { top = { nested = { value = 1; keep = 2; }; }; }; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [ "nested.value" ])

name: marks repeated containers
expr: let x = { a = 1; }; y = { p = x; q = x; }; in builtins.deepSeq y (builtins.lazyToJSON y [])

name: marks repeated containers by first evaluator path
expr: let x = { v = 1; }; y = { a.b.c = x; d = x; }; in builtins.deepSeq y (builtins.lazyToJSON y [])

name: marks recursive attrsets
expr: let x = { self = x; }; in builtins.seq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: serializes derivations as placeholders
expr: let x = derivation { name = "x"; system = builtins.currentSystem; builder = "/bin/sh"; args = [ "-c" "echo hi > $out" ]; }; in builtins.seq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: serializes derivations as placeholders forced
expr: let x = derivation { name = "x"; system = builtins.currentSystem; builder = "/bin/sh"; args = [ "-c" "echo hi > $out" ]; }; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: treats type derivation attrsets as derivations
expr: let x = { type = "derivation"; }; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: serializes forced functions as placeholders
expr: let f = x: x; in builtins.seq f (builtins.lazyToJSON f [])

name: marks blackhole thunks
expr: let x = builtins.lazyToJSON x []; in x

name: serializes finite and non-finite floats
expr: let toml = builtins.fromTOML "nan = nan\npos = inf\nneg = -inf"; x = [ 1.25 toml.nan toml.pos toml.neg ]; in builtins.deepSeq x (builtins.lazyToJSON x [])

name: rejects invalid UTF-8 strings
expr: let s = builtins.readFile @TEST_DIR@/invalid_utf8.bin; in builtins.seq s (builtins.lazyToJSON s [])
expected_error: invalid UTF-8 byte while serializing JSON string at index 0: 0x80

name: rejects invalid UTF-8 continuation bytes
expr: let s = builtins.readFile @TEST_DIR@/invalid_utf8_continuation.bin; in builtins.seq s (builtins.lazyToJSON s [])
expected_error: invalid UTF-8 byte while serializing JSON string at index 1: 0x28

name: rejects invalid UTF-8 second-byte ranges
expr: let s = builtins.readFile @TEST_DIR@/invalid_utf8_range.bin; in builtins.seq s (builtins.lazyToJSON s [])
expected_error: invalid UTF-8 byte while serializing JSON string at index 0: 0xE0
